name: Lavender Infused Soap

fullDescription: Indulge in the soothing, aromatic experience of Maie Couture's Lavender Infused Soap, crafted to elevate your daily routine. This luxurious soap not only revitalizes your skin with its gentle cleansing properties but also enriches your senses with the calming essence of lavender. Made with premium, natural ingredients and inspired by the traditional craftsmanship of nablus soap, our Lavender Infused Soap aligns perfectly with Maie Couture's commitment to quality and elegance. Suitable for all skin types, it promises a refreshing cleanse that leaves your skin feeling soft and fragrant. Elevate your self-care routine with a touch of sophistication only at Maie Couture.

fullDescription: Majdalawi Thobe in Green is part of Maie Couture's curated edit, designed for heritage-inspired craftsmanship and traditional detailing. Crafted with premium materials and careful finishing, each piece balances timeless elegance with modern sophistication.
leadTimeNote: Each piece is meticulously handcrafted, with production taking approximately 3 months to ensure the highest level of craftsmanship.
